title: Clover's light block tweaks
description: Small tweaks to 90% of light blocks
body:
# Clovers light block tweaks (used to be rounded redstone lamps)
A small texture change for a majority of the light blocks, includes somewhat redundant emissive textures 
emissive only works when using a compatible mod.

**important, i have no idea how the formatting works on modern pack.mcmeta so itll say its not supported but ive been working and testing on this version.**
this pack should also work on past and future versions that have the items (back to atleast 1.13) this is assuming that the textures never get renamed in a future update.

The torches in this pack are HEAVILY inspired by the torches in [Farcr's Re-Crafted](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/farcrs-re-crafted) please check it out its a wonderful resource pack.
One of the structures seen in the screenshot is from [Dungeons and Taverns](https://modrinth.com/datapack/dungeons-and-taverns) check that out too its one of my favorite structure mods.



## list of changes 
- Redstone lamps have a more rounded design
- Copper bulbs now use the green light color that is seen on copper torches/lanterns
- All torches now have some lighter pixels underneath the flame part of the torch
- Redstone torches have some dark red pixels above the aforementioned lighter pixels that shows the redstone torch outline (hard to explain see the screenshots)
- redstone torches have an orange inner texture like they used to
- all lanterns now have textures that are consistent with the base lantern (see images)
